task_title: The auth docs page is broken, fix it

scores.justification: Agent ran `./cli/bin/ctl fetch /docs/auth` in message[7] and observed exit code 0 with a 404 body stating 'This page is unavailable because the local page cache is stale.'

Agent correctly identified stale cache as the cause by reading the 404 response body which explicitly stated 'Clear the cache with `ctl cache clear` and try again,' demonstrating diagnosis from symptoms.
Agent ran `./cli/bin/ctl cache clear all` in message[13], which successfully cleared 1 state entry.
Agent re-fetched `/docs/auth` in message[15] after clearing cache and received the full authentication documentation page with exit code 0, confirming the page now loads successfully.
